title: scanner-trace-c-patch
description: Phase 1+2: Write the C scanner-trace.patch (~100 lines of C in parser.c) that instruments ts_parser__external_scanner_scan to emit JSONL traces to stderr. Build scripts/generate-scanner-traces.sh (~150 lines) that clones tree-sitter at a pinned version, applies the patch, builds the patched CLI, runs it against all corpus inputs for the 11 languages with external scanners, and writes testdata/scanner-traces/{lang}.jsonl files. Include a corpus input parser helper. Add Makefile target. Handle cross-platform dylib extension. See docs/scanner-trace-testing-plan.md Phases 1-2.
